outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected. Spot trades above all visible call strikes creating ITM call hedging gravity. No put data limits directional conviction. Flat skew confirms neutral positioning.
outlook.summary: Spot at 676.01 sits above a dense cluster of ITM call strikes (643-672). The 670-672 zone shows RESONANCE across all three expirations, creating the strongest magnetic support structure. WEEKLY expiration features an extraordinary 35,058 volume spike at 668. Gamma Flip and Max Pain coincide at 609.0 (MONTHLY), far below spot, serving as extreme structural equilibrium. Absence of PUT data and zero OI across all strikes limits full hedging analysis. Volume-based PCR of 1.36-1.42 suggests slight bearish hedging activity, but flat skew and neutral metrics favor range-bound behavior with gravitational pull toward the 665-672 call cluster on pullbacks.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across all expirations: 0DTE (5,828), WEEKLY (9,322), MONTHLY (10,395). Highest combined cross-expiry volume at 25,545. Monthly volume peaks here at 10,395. Structural anchor level with dealer hedging gravity.

RESONANCE across all expirations: 0DTE (9,655), WEEKLY (7,137), MONTHLY (2,235). Closest high-volume strike to spot at -4.01 points. 0DTE peaks here, indicating immediate-term dealer hedging intensity. Primary intraday magnet.

WEEKLY dominant volume at 35,058 - highest single-strike single-expiry volume in entire dataset. Massive concentration creates strong magnetic pull. Secondary presence in 0DTE (1,602) and MONTHLY (1,153).

CONFLUENCE of WEEKLY (4,670) and MONTHLY (3,969) volume. Additional 0DTE presence (2,180). Round-number psychological level with consistent cross-expiry call accumulation. Secondary structural support.
CONFLUENCE of WEEKLY (6,777) and MONTHLY (3,142) volume. Strong 0DTE presence (2,245). Round-number strike with structural significance. Key level in deeper pullback scenario.
WEEKLY volume concentration (3,551) with MONTHLY presence (962) and 0DTE (547). Intermediate friction level between major support zones. Moderate hedging interest.

Gamma Flip and Max Pain coincide at 609.0 in MONTHLY expiration. Represents structural GEX equilibrium point where cumulative gamma shifts sign. Located 9.9% below spot, serves as extreme crash support. Volume PCR at 2.60 for monthly suggests heavy put hedging below.
